mapper.sql: h.id, h.user_id AS userId, h.attraction_content_id AS attractionContentId, h.visit_date AS date, h.description, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.updated_at AS updatedAt, u.email AS writerEmail, u.name AS writerName, a.title AS name, a.addr1 AS address, a.first_image1 AS imageUrl, a.first_image1 AS firstimage, COALESCE(ct.content_type_name, 'Hotplace') AS type, a.content_type_id AS contentTypeId, a.area_code AS areaCode, a.si_gun_gu_code AS siGunGuCode, a.latitude AS latitude, a.longitude AS longitude, a.latitude AS mapy, a.longitude AS mapx

FROM hotplaces h JOIN users u ON u.id = h.user_id JOIN attractions a ON a.content_id = h.attraction_content_id LEFT JOIN contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id LEFT JOIN sidos s ON s.sido_code = a.area_code
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC, h.id DESC

SELECT
WHERE
a.area_code = #{areaCode}
s.sido_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%') OR a.addr1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%')
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC, h.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotplaces (user_id, attraction_content_id, visit_date, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{attractionContentId}, #{date}, #{description})
